# `api.jobs.shipment.get_rates_state`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/shipment/ratesstate` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.shipment.get_rates_state(job_display_id: int) -> RatesState
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs shipment get_rates_state <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/shipment/ratesstate``

## Response

Returns `RatesState`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `state` | `Optional[str]` | no | Current rates state |
| `rates` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Available rates |
| `fromZip` | `Optional[str]` | no | Origin ZIP code |
| `toZip` | `Optional[str]` | no | Destination ZIP code |
| `itemWeight` | `Optional[float]` | no | Total item weight |
| `services` | `Optional[list]` | no | Available services |
| `parcelItems` | `Optional[list]` | no | Parcel items |
| `parcelServices` | `Optional[list]` | no | Parcel services |
| `shipOutDate` | `Optional[str]` | no | Ship out date |
